texto: Finish each day and be done with it. You have done what you could. Some blunders and absurdities no doubt crept in
autor: forget them as soon as you can. Tomorrow is a new day. You shall begin it serenely and with too high a spirit to be encumbered with your old nonsense.
explicacao: Citação de forget them as soon as you can. Tomorrow is a new day. You shall begin it serenely and with too high a spirit to be encumbered with your old nonsense. sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “Finish each day and be done with it. You have done what you could. Some blunders and absurdities …” articula reflexao, ralph-waldo-emerson, finish em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
